items: User prefers concise replies, does not want tool/action logs or exact commands surfaced unless explicitly requested.
User wants more casual tone and more emojis in normal conversation.
Default timezone for scheduling and time references should be Hong Kong time (GMT+8) unless told otherwise.
Set up OpenCode local config with custom yunwu.ai baseURL and shared API key auth; smoke test passed.
Created ~/Projects as the default folder for future coding projects.
Set up GitHub CLI auth for account `dittoailwj`; created repos `dittos.github.io` and `dittoailwj.github.io`.
Built and deployed Ditto personal website with clean URL at https://dittoailwj.github.io/ ; old project URL https://dittoailwj.github.io/dittos.github.io/ is also still updated.
Added documents section, published scale-up networking report webpage, and added daily briefs archive page at /briefs/.
Preferred vibe: professional most of the time, a bit fun outside work settings.
Ethan is a network researcher specializing in scale-up networking.
Expectation: help offload research-related tasks to improve productivity.
User preference: call Ethan "boss" from now on.
User is currently in Hong Kong; use GMT+8 for time references in the future.
